notes: DV/transcode jobs no longer wrongly requeue: a job counts as 'worker offline' only when the node's heartbeat is actually stale, not when a multi-threaded node's shared worker id moved to another job (this was killing 20-min DV extracts every 5 min). Node v2.18: run_node.bat opens the GUI (update bell), accurate per-node update status, and Gemini multi-key rotation + pacing.
